claim_boundary: Reference targets only. Do not merge SCBE private harness rows into public ranks unless the unchanged upstream benchmark harness produced the row and the required artifacts are published.

public_targets.source_note: Official Terminal-Bench 2.1 leaderboard states results were run and verified by a Terminal-Bench team member.
public_targets.comparison_boundary: SCBE can only rank here after Harbor runs the exact Terminal-Bench 2.1 dataset with unchanged timeouts/resources.

Aider measures code-editing model behavior inside Aider; SCBE must run the Aider benchmark path before comparing.
